items.title: Factory hits $1.5B valuation to build AI coding for enterprises
items.summary: The three-year-old startup raised $150 million led by Khosla Ventures.

items.title: Wealth.com Nabs $65M Series B Round
items.summary: PHOENIX, AZ, Wealth.com, the AI-powered platform modernizing how wealth management firms deliver estate and tax planning, today announced it has raised $65 million in an oversubscribed Series B round.
